title: Prohibits the manufacture, sale or distribution of Fixed Dose Combination of Vitamin B, vitamin B6 and Vitamin B12 for human_Section

T>rm 17-8-99 %wa^ft?itfirfrf^tTTTqT«n i MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 14th October, 1999 G.S.R. 702(E).—Whereas tlic Central Government is satisfied that the use of the Fixed Dose Combination of Vitamin B,, Vitamin B6, Vitamin B12 does not have the therapeutic value claimed or purported to be claimed for it; 3060 01/99 (I) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY |PART H—SEC. 3(i)] And whereas it is necessary and expedient to prohibit the manufacture, sale or distribution of the said combina- tion of Vitamin B,, VitaininB^and Vitamin Bl2 for human use in public interest: Now. tlierefore, in exercise ofthe powers conferred by Section 2c'>Aof the Drugs and Cosmetics Act. 1940 (23 of 1940), the Central Government hereby proliibits the manufacture, sale or distribution of Fixed Dose Combuialion of Vitamin B,, Vitamii^ Bf and Vitamin B| 2 for human use with effect from 1st January, 2001.- ^ |F.No. X-l 1014/6/99-DMS'& PFA1 DEEPAK GUPTA, Jt. Secy. Foot Note: —The Drugs and Cosmetics Rules, 1945, as amended upto 1-5-1979 is contained in the publication of the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare (Department of Health) containing the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940 and the Rules (PDGHS-61) last amended vide GSR 591(E) dated 17-8-99.
